map.title: Steal the brainrot map
map.fortniteIslandNote: Fortnite Creative — enter this code in Discover (search). Map authors release updates; verify the latest version in-game.

sections.title: Lucky Rot
sections.intro: Each Lucky Rot always gives Brainrots of the same type as the Lucky Rot itself (e.g. Diamond Lucky Rot will give a Diamond brainrot).
sections.footnote: *A Bananananito Bandito would get replaced with Chillin Chilly if the chosen type is Halloween. A Bim Bim Bim Sadim would get replaced with Bambini Tankini if the chosen type is Christmas.

sections.title: Grande Rot
sections.intro: Each Grande Rot always gives Brainrots of the same type as the Grande Rot itself (e.g. Rainbow Grande Rot will give a Rainbow brainrot).

sections.title: Pumpkin Rot
sections.intro: Pumpkin Rot has a 10% chance of giving a Halloween type brainrot (otherwise Normal).

sections.title: Present Rot
sections.intro: Present Rot has a 100% chance of giving a Christmas type brainrot.

sections.title: Love Rot
sections.intro: Love Rot has a 10% chance of giving a Lovely type brainrot (otherwise Normal).

sections.title: Easter Rot
sections.intro: Easter Rot has a 15% chance of giving a brainrot with one of the following mutations: Dreamy, Chocolate, Love, Void or Heaven. Otherwise default.

sections.title: FOREST ROT
sections.intro: Each Forest Rot always gives Brainrots of the same type as the Grande Rot itself (e.g. Rainbow Forest Rot will give a Rainbow brainrot).

traits.footnote: ** Per wave hit. It will only apply the trait if the wave type has a lower or equal multiplier than the current brainrot type.

intro: Llama Rot rates depend on how many interactions you hit correctly on the llama.
The number of interactions allowed varies based on the player's rebirth level. See the table below.
llamarots.codesNote: Llama Rot is also sometimes available via codes.
llamarots.brainrotSectionIntro: Here are all rates for brainrots in Llama Rot. Rates are the same for all Llama Rot types; only the brainrot type changes.
interactionColumnHints: If you fail on the first or the second interaction, you fall under column 1

meta.title: Eternal Machine (normal)
meta.sourceNote: minIncomeMs in M/s; tier = sum of catalog base incomePerSec (no type/trait), ÷1e6, strictly > threshold. MACHINE RATES (NORMAL) rows aligned to in-game reference sheet (May 2026).

specials.name: La Superior Combinacion (boost)
specials.summary: Two different brainrots between Bearini Plammini Guardini, Garbagzilla, Tiramisubmarini, or Cannelloni Dragoni
specials.replaceWith: La Superior Combinacion fixed at 2% with standard machine rates, 3% with premium machine rates.

typeNotes: Christmas / Halloween brainrots in the machine can still skew those mutation outcomes.

If the rolled type is Christmas or Halloween but the output brainrot does not support it, the fuse picks uniformly among Rainbow, Galaxy, Zombie, Dreamy, Ice & Fire, Carnival, Darkness, Aqua, Neon, Chocolate, Toxic, Lovely, Void, Heaven, and Crystal.
eternal_machine_reference.groupRule: If the roll lands on a group, one brainrot is picked uniformly between its members.

brainrots.name: Job Job Job Sahur
brainrots.description: Used for the Job Job Ritual.

brainrots.name: Ferinsini Luckini
brainrots.description: A Ferinsini Luckini with traits will activate the trait events for 5 minutes.

brainrots.name: Present Rot
brainrots.description: During the Christmas event, Present Rot has a 1% chance to be rolled.

brainrots.name: Chocone Dragone
brainrots.description: During Love events, a Chocone Dragone has a 30% chance to replace a Cannelloni Dragoni.

brainrots.name: Love Rot
brainrots.description: During Love Rot and Lucky Rot events, Love Rot has a 0.25% chance to be rolled.

brainrots.name: Clove Clove Clove Sahur
brainrots.description: 4% Chance of spawning upon activating a Ferinsini Luckini.

brainrots.name: Trifoglita Bicicleta
brainrots.description: 1% Chance of spawning upon activating a Ferinsini Luckini.

brainrots.name: Koinobori Shogunelli
brainrots.description: Collect 500 Carps in the Carp fish mini-game and claim it
